name: io.github.imatza-rh/mcp-zuul
description: Zuul CI — build failure analysis, log search, pipeline status, and job configuration

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio, sse, or streamable-http (default: stdio)

environmentVariables.name: ZUUL_ENABLED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tools to enable (disables all others)

environmentVariables.name: ZUUL_DISABLED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tools to disable
